sql: SELECT c.*, o.order_id FROM customer c JOIN order_main o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE c.customer_id = ?
SELECT product_name, price FROM product WHERE category_id = ? AND status = 'active'
SELECT order_id, total_amount, status FROM order_main WHERE customer_id = ? AND created_at > ?
SELECT SUM(total_amount) as total_sales, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM order_main WHERE created_at BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY customer_id
SELECT AVG(price) as avg_price, MAX(price) as max_price, MIN(price) as min_price FROM product GROUP BY category_id
SELECT p.*, c.category_name FROM product p JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.stock_quantity > 0
UPDATE order_main SET status = 'shipped' WHERE order_id = ? AND status = 'paid'
SELECT * FROM customer WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(email, '') != ''
DELETE FROM shopping_cart WHERE customer_id = ? AND product_id = ?
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, quantity, price) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT order_id, tracking_number FROM logistics WHERE status = 'in_transit' ORDER BY created_at DESC
